title: FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION - 211info
text: DEVNW SALEM FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Counseling services for those at risk of foreclosure or eviction to find options and solutions to keep their home. Can participate in mediation. 528 Cottage Street NE Suite 1C Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 779-2680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 779-2680 Alternate (541) 345-7106 ext 2060 Ross Kanaga [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to enroll and submit documents or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Services: Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
